description: A single UAP observation record — the core unit of the DisclosureOS lexicon.

value.description: Machine-comparable anchor (ISO-like, as precise as known, e.g. `1947`, `1947-07`).

granularity.description: Precision of a date value, from calendar-day (`exact`) to `century`.

certainty.description: Confidence in a date or time value — the single certainty scale for all temporal values.

notes.description: Free-text caveats about how this date was determined.

start.description: A date whose precision is coarser than a calendar day (e.g. "summer 1947").

end.description: A date whose precision is coarser than a calendar day (e.g. "summer 1947").

type.description: What a DateRange represents (a true span vs. an uncertainty window, etc.).

inclusive.description: Whether the end date is included in the range. Defaults to true.

referenceEvent.description: The event this date is anchored to (e.g. "the crash").

referenceDate.description: A date whose precision is coarser than a calendar day (e.g. "summer 1947").

relation.description: How this date relates to the reference event.

offset.description: Distance from the reference event (e.g. value 3, unit "days").

display.description: Human display override, e.g. "three days after the crash".

date.description: Canonical, machine-sortable date anchor in ISO YYYY-MM-DD form. ALWAYS present, even when the true date is fuzzy or a range — set it to the best single representative. Express nuance via dateGranularity, dateRange, or relativeDate.

dateCertainty.description: Confidence in a date or time value — the single certainty scale for all temporal values.

dateGranularity.description: Precision of `date`. Defaults to day-level when omitted (e.g. "July 1947" → date "1947-07-01", dateGranularity "month").

time.description: Local clock time of the observation (HH:MM or HH:MM:SS, 24-hour).

timezone.description: IANA timezone of the local time (e.g. "America/Los_Angeles").

utcTime.description: Observation time converted to UTC, when known.

timeCertainty.description: Confidence in a date or time value — the single certainty scale for all temporal values.

durationSeconds.description: How long the observation lasted, in seconds.

durationDescription.description: Duration as reported when not precisely known (e.g. "several minutes").

timeOfDay.description: Twilight-aware time-of-day bucket for an observation.

isDaylightSaving.description: Whether daylight saving time was in effect at the local time.

moonPhase.description: Moon phase at the time of observation (0 = new moon, 0.5 = full, 1 = new).

moonIllumination.description: Fraction of the moon illuminated at the time of observation (0–1).

dateRange.description: For events spanning a period or with a genuine uncertainty window. `date` should still anchor within/at the range.

relativeDate.description: For dates known only relative to another event (e.g. "3 days after the crash").

siteType.description: Category of site at or near the observation location (military, nuclear, civilian, natural, etc.).

siteName.description: Name of the nearby site (e.g. "Naval Air Station Oceana").

distanceKm.description: Distance from the observation location, in kilometers.

bearing.description: Compass bearing from the observation location to the site, in degrees (0–360).

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this location.

name.description: Human-readable place name (e.g. "Off the coast of San Diego").

address.description: Street address, when the location is that precise.

coordinatePrecision.description: How precisely a coordinate is known.

coordinatePrecisionMeters.description: Numeric uncertainty radius of the coordinates, in meters.

coordinatesApproximate.description: Whether the coordinates are an approximation rather than a measured fix.

elevationMeters.description: Ground elevation at the location, in meters above sea level.

elevationSource.description: How the elevation value was obtained.

siteType.description: Category of site at or near the observation location (military, nuclear, civilian, natural, etc.).

secondarySiteTypes.description: Additional site categories that also apply to the location.

items.description: Category of site at or near the observation location (military, nuclear, civilian, natural, etc.).

terrain.description: Physical terrain at the observation location.

airspaceClass.description: Airspace classification over the location (ICAO classes plus special-use airspace).

locationSensitivity.description: How sensitive the location is (e.g. proximity to critical infrastructure).

proximitySites.description: Named sites of interest near the observation, with distance and bearing.

items.description: A site of interest near the observation and its distance/bearing.

nearestMilitaryKm.description: Distance to the nearest military installation, in kilometers.

nearestNuclearKm.description: Distance to the nearest nuclear facility, in kilometers.

nearestAirportKm.description: Distance to the nearest airport, in kilometers.

waterDepthMeters.description: Water depth at the location for maritime observations, in meters.

vesselName.description: Name of the vessel the observer was aboard, if any.

aircraftType.description: Type of aircraft the observer was aboard, if any.

flightNumber.description: Commercial flight number, for airline observations.

observerAltitudeMeters.description: Altitude of an airborne observer at the time of observation, in meters.

shape.description: Reported shape of the observed object.

size.description: Apparent size as reported (e.g. "size of a commercial airliner").

sizeMeters.description: Estimated size of the object, in meters.

color.description: Primary color of the object as reported.

secondaryColors.description: Additional colors observed on the object.

luminosity.description: Light emission as reported (e.g. "glowing white", "self-luminous", "no lights").

sound.description: Whether and what sound the object produced (e.g. "silent", "humming").

soundDescription.description: Fuller free-text description of any sound.

surfaceDetails.description: Visible surface features (e.g. "metallic, seamless, no rivets or seams").

formation.description: Geometric arrangement when multiple objects were observed (e.g. "triangular formation").

sourceId.description: Stable unique identifier for this source.

type.description: Kind of source backing an observation (document, testimony, media, etc.).

title.description: Title of the source document, article, or material.

organization.description: Organization that produced or published the source.

date.description: Publication or creation date of the source (ISO date).

archiveUrl.description: Archived copy of the source (e.g. Wayback Machine), in case the original disappears.

reference.description: Citation locator within the source (e.g. page number, document section).

credibility.description: Trust tier of a source — an orthogonal axis to confidence and temporal certainty.

isPrimarySource.description: Whether this is a primary source (original document/recording) rather than secondary reporting.

classificationLevel.description: Government classification of the source, if it was ever classified.

primarySource.description: A citation/source backing an observation, with its credibility tier.

items.description: A citation/source backing an observation, with its credibility tier.

originalClassification.description: Original government classification of the source material (e.g. "SECRET").

declassificationDate.description: When the source material was declassified (ISO date).

foiaRequestId.description: FOIA request number that produced the source material.

archiveLocation.description: Physical or digital archive where the source material resides.

investigatingBody.description: Primary organization that investigated (e.g. "AARO", "Project Blue Book").

investigatingBodies.description: All organizations that investigated, when more than one.

caseNumber.description: Case or file number assigned by the investigating body.

investigationDate.description: When the investigation was conducted (ISO date).

findings.description: Summary of what the investigation found.

speed.description: Speed as reported (e.g. "faster than any known aircraft").

speedKmh.description: Estimated speed, in kilometers per hour.

altitudeMeters.description: Estimated altitude of the object, in meters.

heading.description: Direction of travel, in compass degrees (0–360).

flightPath.description: Narrative of the object’s path through the encounter (e.g. "descended from 80,000 ft to sea level").

maneuvers.description: Distinctive maneuvers exhibited, from the typed vocabulary.

items.description: A distinctive movement/maneuver exhibited by the object.

maneuverDescriptions.description: Free-text descriptions elaborating on the typed maneuvers.

radarData.description: Whether the movement was tracked on radar.

infraredSignature.description: Whether the object showed an infrared signature.

categories.description: Kinds of witnesses present (e.g. "military pilots", "radar operators", "civilians").

militaryWitnesses.description: Whether any witnesses were military personnel.

aviationWitnesses.description: Whether any witnesses were pilots or aviation professionals.

multipleIndependent.description: Whether independent witnesses observed from separate vantage points.

professionalObservers.description: Whether any witnesses were trained observers (pilots, astronomers, military).

descriptions.description: Brief summaries of individual witness accounts.

id.description: Stable id, addressable by a claim `evidenceRef` ("sensor:<id>").

sensorType.description: Class of sensor that produced a reading.

detectionMethod.description: How a sensor detected the object.

sensorRef.description: Reference to a published sensor-manifest entry ("<org-slug>:<sensor-id>", e.g. "eldaeon:dionysus-passive-radar") carrying the instrument’s full spec, timing, and calibration provenance.

operator.description: Person or unit operating the sensor.

timestamp.description: When the reading was recorded (ISO timestamp).

duration.description: How long the sensor held contact, in seconds.

rawDataAvailable.description: Whether the raw sensor data still exists and is obtainable.

calibrated.description: Whether the sensor was calibrated at the time of the reading.

readings.description: Sensor-specific measured values, keyed by measurement name.

items.description: A single sensor reading and its provenance.

multiSensorCorrelation.description: Whether independent sensors corroborated the same object.

dataRetentionStatus.description: Current status of the underlying sensor data.

anomalies.description: Anomalies in the sensor data itself (e.g. "jamming indications", "signal dropout").

mediaAttention.description: Whether the observation received media coverage.

publicImpact.description: Effect on public awareness or discourse.

policyImpact.description: Policy consequences (e.g. hearings, legislation, reporting-process changes).

militaryResponse.description: Military actions taken (e.g. intercept scrambled, alert status changed).

coverUpAlleged.description: Whether suppression or concealment of the event has been alleged.

celestialConditions.description: Sky conditions relevant to identification (e.g. visible planets, meteor showers, satellites).

moonPhase.description: Moon phase description at the time of observation.

precipitation.description: Precipitation at the time of observation, if any.

kind.description: How one observation relates to another (typed edge vocabulary).

note.description: Free-text context for why the link exists.

edges.description: Typed edges to other observations — the standardized way to link records.

items.description: A typed link from this observation to another.

flap.description: Named grouping into a flap (a localized cluster of sightings).

wave.description: Named grouping into a wave (a broad temporal surge of sightings).

cluster.description: Named grouping into an ad-hoc cluster.

aircraftType.description: Type of aircraft involved (e.g. "F/A-18F Super Hornet").

aircraftDesignation.description: Military designation or tail number of the aircraft.

squadron.description: Squadron or unit the aircraft belonged to.

flightMission.description: Mission being flown at the time (e.g. "training exercise", "combat air patrol").

altitude.description: Aircraft altitude during the encounter, in meters.

speed.description: Aircraft speed during the encounter, in kilometers per hour.

heading.description: Aircraft heading during the encounter, in compass degrees (0–360).

radarContact.description: Whether the aircraft’s radar held contact with the object.

weaponsSystemEngaged.description: Whether a weapons system locked onto or tracked the object.

interceptAttempted.description: Whether an intercept of the object was attempted.

id.description: Stable id, addressable by a claim `evidenceRef` ("media:<id>").

url.description: Where the media file is hosted.

caption.description: Human-readable caption describing what the media shows.

credit.description: Attribution for who captured or owns the media.

duration.description: Playback duration for video/audio, in seconds.

width.description: Pixel width for images and video.

height.description: Pixel height for images and video.

entryId.description: Stable unique identifier for this custody entry.

date.description: When the custody event occurred (ISO date).

action.description: An action recorded in a chain-of-custody entry.

from.description: Party that held the evidence before this event.

to.description: Party that held the evidence after this event.

location.description: Where the custody event took place.

reference.description: Document or record substantiating the event (e.g. transfer receipt, log entry).

evidenceId.description: Identifier of the evidence item this custody history belongs to.

status.description: Custody status of an evidence item.

items.description: A single custody event for an evidence item.

algorithm.description: Cryptographic hash algorithm used to fingerprint a file.

value.description: Hex-encoded hash digest of the file contents.

device.description: Capture device as recorded in metadata (e.g. "iPhone 14 Pro").

software.description: Software that produced or processed the file.

originalFilename.description: Filename as originally captured, before any renaming.

originalCreationDate.description: Creation timestamp embedded in the file metadata.

gpsCoordinates.description: GPS position embedded in the file metadata.

metadataPreserved.description: Whether the original metadata survives intact.

metadataStripped.description: Whether metadata was removed at some point.

strippedReason.description: Why metadata was stripped (e.g. "platform re-encoding", "privacy redaction").

verifier.description: Name of the person who performed the verification.

credentials.description: Verifier’s relevant qualifications (e.g. "certified forensic video analyst").

date.description: When the verification was performed (ISO date).

method.description: Method used to verify media authenticity.

methodDescription.description: Fuller description of how the verification was performed.

confidence.description: Verifier’s confidence in their own result.

findings.description: Summary of what the verification found.

reportUrl.description: Link to the full verification report.

hash.description: A content hash of a file.

items.description: A content hash of a file.

captureMetadata.description: Capture/EXIF-style metadata extracted from a media file.

items.description: An independent authenticity assessment of media or a document.

provenanceChain.description: Ordered hops the file took from capture to here (e.g. "witness phone → NYT → public release").

manipulationDetected.description: Whether any analysis found evidence of manipulation.

manipulationDescription.description: What manipulation was found, if any.

authenticityConfidence.description: Overall confidence in the authenticity assessment.

lastUpdated.description: When this provenance record was last updated (ISO timestamp).

notes.description: Free-text context about the provenance trail.

custodyStatus.description: Custody status of an evidence item.

custody.description: The full custody history for a piece of evidence.

digital.description: Digital authenticity trail for media: hashes, capture metadata, and verifications.

system.description: External identifier namespace (reporting centers, archives, academic registries, media hosts).

systemName.description: Display name of the system, required when `system` is "custom".

value.description: The identifier value within the external system (e.g. a case number).

url.description: Direct link to the record in the external system.

verified.description: Whether the identifier has been confirmed to point at this observation.

verifiedDate.description: When the identifier was last verified (ISO date).

accessible.description: Whether the external record is currently reachable.

accessCheckedDate.description: When accessibility was last checked (ISO date).

primary.description: A reference to this observation in an external system or archive.

items.description: A reference to this observation in an external system or archive.

isProfessionalObserver.description: Whether the witness is a trained observer (pilot, astronomer, military).

hasAviationExperience.description: Whether the witness has aviation experience.

hasMilitaryExperience.description: Whether the witness has military experience.

hasScientificBackground.description: Whether the witness has a scientific background.

hasPriorUAPKnowledge.description: Whether the witness had prior knowledge of or interest in UAP before the observation.

wasSkepticPrior.description: Whether the witness was a skeptic before the observation.

underOathTestimony.description: Whether the testimony was given under oath.

polygraphPassed.description: Whether the witness passed the polygraph.

consistentTestimony.description: Whether the account has remained consistent across retellings.

willingToBeIdentified.description: Whether the witness is willing to be publicly identified.

notes.description: Free-text context about the credibility assessment.

witnessId.description: Stable unique identifier for this witness.

anonymous.description: Whether the witness’s identity is withheld.

publicName.description: Witness’s name as publicly known, when not anonymous.

pseudonym.description: Pseudonym used when the witness is anonymous.

role.description: Witness’s role at the time (e.g. "F/A-18F pilot", "radar operator").

organization.description: Organization the witness belonged to at the time.

securityClearance.description: Security clearance level held by a witness.

credibility.description: Structured assessment of a witness's credibility (rating, factors, detractors).

statementSummary.description: Brief summary of what the witness reported.

interviewAvailable.description: Whether a recorded interview with the witness exists.

writtenReportAvailable.description: Whether a written report from the witness exists.

date.description: When the testimony was given (ISO date).

certainty.description: Confidence in a date or time value — the single certainty scale for all temporal values.

statementId.description: Stable id, addressable by a claim `evidenceRef` ("testimony:<statementId>").

witness.description: A person who reported or corroborated an observation.

context.description: The setting in which testimony was given.

date.description: When testimony was given, with its certainty.

content.description: Full text of the statement, when available.

summary.description: Brief summary of what the statement asserts.

sourceDocument.description: A citation/source backing an observation, with its credibility tier.

chainOfCustody.description: Custody status of an evidence item.

additionalEvidenceIds.description: Ids of other evidence items the statement references or supports.

id.description: Stable id, addressable by a claim `evidenceRef` ("physical:<id>").

quality.description: Collection/handling quality of a physical evidence item.

description.description: What the evidence item is and what makes it notable.

collectionDate.description: When the evidence was collected (ISO date).

collectionMethod.description: How the evidence was collected (e.g. "sterile swab", "soil core sample").

storageLocation.description: Where the evidence is currently stored.

chainOfCustody.description: Custody status of an evidence item.

analysisPerformed.description: Analyses run on the evidence (e.g. "isotopic analysis", "spectroscopy").

analysisResults.description: Summary of what the analyses found.

photographed.description: Whether the evidence was photographed in situ or in the lab.

labReport.description: Whether a formal laboratory report exists.

notes.description: Free-text context about the evidence item.

controlNumbers.description: Agency control or tracking numbers stamped on the document.

foiaRequestNumber.description: FOIA request number that produced the document.

declassificationDate.description: When the document was declassified (ISO date).

originalClassification.description: Classification the document carried when created.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the document.

redactionLevel.description: How much of the document is redacted.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this observation.

temporal.description: When an observation occurred — a sortable anchor date plus optional fuzzy/range/relative nuance.

location.description: Where an observation occurred — identity, coordinates, site classification, and proximity context.

status.description: Lifecycle/publication state of an observation record.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the record was last updated.

summary.description: One-or-two sentence summary of the observation.

description.description: Full narrative account of the observation.

objectCharacteristics.description: Physical description of the observed object(s).

eventType.description: Local event-type tag (e.g. "multi-sensor military encounter"). The word "classification" is reserved for the origin taxonomy in @disclosureos/origins; this is just a free-text descriptor.

sourceData.description: Where the observation data came from. Forensic custody/authenticity now lives in the optional `Observation.provenance` slot (@disclosureos/records/extensions/provenance).

movement.description: How the object moved — kinematics and notable maneuvers.

witnesses.description: Aggregate summary of who witnessed the observation.

sensorEvidence.description: Instrument-recorded evidence for an observation (radar, FLIR, EO, etc.).

responseImpact.description: Official, media, and public response to the observation.

environment.description: Environmental and weather conditions at the time of observation.

relations.description: Typed links to related observations, plus flap/wave/cluster groupings.

aviation.description: Aviation context when the observation involved aircraft.

items.description: A media file associated with an observation (image, video, document, or audio).

featuredMedia.description: A media file associated with an observation (image, video, document, or audio).

provenance.description: Forensic provenance for an observation: custody status/chain and digital authenticity.

identifiers.description: External identifiers cross-referencing this observation, with an optional primary.

items.description: A single witness statement, its context, and supporting documentation.
A physical artifact associated with an observation and its handling record.
Provenance metadata for a source document (classification, agency, redaction).

dataSourceId.description: Identifier of the dataset or pipeline this record came from.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the records schema this record was authored against.

extensions.description: Third-party extension bag for slots not owned by a first-party package.

internalNotes.description: Private working notes for maintainers — not part of the public record.
